category_title: Autistic students with partial mathematical processing and discrepancy gestures
minimal_context: Rico is working one-on-one with a teacher on a task sheet to identify which images, such as a pencil or cap, resemble a beam.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Look at the task sheet. Select the image 'pencil' or 'cap' that looks like the 'beam'.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Moves hand as if about to give the sign '√' in the picture 'cap', but hesitates.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: What do you think? Keep going.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Changes expression and turns attention to observe the image 'Tissue' instead.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Give your personal mark '√' in the picture.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Gives the personal mark '√' in the picture of the 'Tissue', making the wrong choice of picture.)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Look at the task sheet. Select the image 'pencil' or 'cap' that looks like the 'beam'.

STUDENT: (Moves hand as if about to give the sign '√' in the picture 'cap', but hesitates.)

TUTOR: What do you think? Keep going.

STUDENT: (Changes expression and turns attention to observe the image 'Tissue' instead.)

TUTOR: Give your personal mark '√' in the picture.

STUDENT: (Gives the personal mark '√' in the picture of the 'Tissue', making the wrong choice of picture.)

task.content: Select images 'pencil' or 'cap' that looks like 'beams'
task.learning_goal: Identify the forms of concrete objects that resemble geometric shapes

context.materials: Task sheet with images of 'beam', 'pencil', 'cap', and 'Tissue'

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When asked to select images 'pencil' or 'cap' that looks like 'beams'
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Hand movements Rico was about to give the sign '√' in the picture 'cap' but hesitated. Rico expression instead turned his attention to observe the image 'Tissue'.
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Discrepancy gesture indicating difficulty matching the correct image option specified.

behavior_patterns.condition: When observing the task sheet options
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Gives personal mark '√' in the picture. This idea was right but the wrong choice of picture.
